source_metadata.title: 2024/12/05 - FD [Part 1]
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 5 December 2024 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

Item of business: 

2023/24 Annual review of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade 

Hearing of evidence: 

Hon Todd McClay, Associate Minister of Foreign Affairs

Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade 

                 Bede Corry, Chief Executive and Foreign Secretary
                 Rob Taylor, Deputy Chief Executive, People and Operations Group
                 Vangelis Vitalis, Deputy Secretary, Trade and Economic Group
                 Bernadette Cavanagh, Deputy Secretary, Pacific and Development Group
                 Paula Wilson, Deputy Secretary, Europe, Middle East & Africa and Australia Group
                 Victoria Hallum, Deputy Secretary, Multilateral and Legal Affairs Group
                 Mark Sinclair, Acting Deputy Secretary, Americas and Asia Group
                 David Evans, Divisional Manager, Strategy and Performance Division
                 Jonathan Curr, Divisional Manager, Middle East and Africa Division
                 Raylene Liufalani, Chief of Staff
                 Corinne Ambler, Chief Media Adviser
                 Sarah Corbett, Divisional Manager, Executive Services Division
                 Catherine Pantling, Senior Adviser, Executive Services Division
